name: Diabetic Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook raisins until soft.
2. Drain the water from the cooked raisins and mix with applesauce, eggs, sweetener, and oil.
3. Mix in baking soda, flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, vanilla, and salt until well combined.
4. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes in an 8-inch by 8-inch or 9-inch by 9-inch pan.
